market_overview.headline: Market breadth deteriorating with 32% of stocks in Full Bear mode while major indices test key EMA support levels.
market_overview.detail: SPY and QQQ both in unstacked bearish structures below their 8W/13W EMAs, while 47% of stocks are in some form of bearish configuration. BTC in Full Bear adds to risk-off sentiment, though 27% still maintain bullish trends.

reversal_candidates.headline: Bear Rally Reversals — Early Cross Signals

momentum_themes.headline: Memory/Storage Acceleration
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology leads momentum with memory and storage names showing explosive acceleration. Memory shortage narrative driving semiconductor equipment and data storage plays.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy vs Tech Divergence

strongest.note: Perfect bullish scores across all energy names as commodity cycle accelerates.
Mining and metals showing uniform strength with global infrastructure demand.
Industrial recovery theme intact with 89% bullish participation.

weakest.note: Massive underperformance with 91% in bearish structures — valuation reset continues.
Banking sector weakness with 63% bearish despite interest rate environment.
Complete bearish capture as growth premium contracts.

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth/tech into cyclicals and commodities. Energy minerals perfection contrasts sharply with technology services collapse.

items.text: Major indices below key EMA support with BTC Full Bear signaling risk-off sentiment
Technology services sector showing 91% bearish participation — avoid blind knife catching
44 Bull Breakdown signals suggest established uptrends starting to crack
High volume pullbacks (like ADTTF at 5.71x) suggest institutional distribution
